The Perpetual Commodity Vaults Protocol

Commodity vaults provide investors an inflation hedged return backed by a legal contract secured on underlying farmland. LandX makes commodity vaults available as a liquid digital asset.

Farmers

Receive upfront capital for committing a legal share of their crop in perpetuity.

Validators

Help tokenize farmland crops through a decentralized legal and economic framework.

Investors

Buy xTokens for asymmetric exposure to real farmland commodities.

Why invest in xTokens?

Benefit from a unique on-chain financial instrument backed by one of the most valuable real world assets - global farmland.

Hedge Against Inflation

xTokens provide exposure to farmland commodities and act as a natural long-term hedge against inflation.

Hedge Against Inflation

xTokens provide exposure to farmland commodities and act as a natural long-term hedge against inflation.

Diversify Your Portfolio

Exposure to commodities provides an uncorrelated diversification from crypto, stocks, and bonds.

Diversify Your Portfolio

Exposure to commodities provides an uncorrelated diversification from crypto, stocks, and bonds.

Liquid Digital Income

xTokens are traded 365 days a year on decentralized exchanges such as Uniswap.

Liquid Digital Income

xTokens are traded 365 days a year on decentralized exchanges such as Uniswap.

Collect Daily Yield

Crop yield is added daily and can be claimed in USDC anytime. Each xToken adds 0.0027 kg of the underlying crop per day, equating to 1 kg per year.

Collect Daily Yield

Crop yield is added daily and can be claimed in USDC anytime. Each xToken adds 0.0027 kg of the underlying crop per day, equating to 1 kg per year.

Explore xTokens

Each staked xToken yields one cToken per year. cToken price is pegged to the price of one kilogram of the underlying commodity. At any time, the holder may convert accumulated cTokens into USDC, at market price.

Every xToken vault is backed by crop share from real productive farmland.

XCORN $1.98
APR 18.6%
TVL $516K

TVL $482.7K

TVL $519.8K

How LandX Works

  • LandX provides capital to real-world farmers in exchange for a legal share of their crop in perpetuity.
  • The contract is ensured by a farm audit, security deposit, and lien on their land.
  • The farmer's crop share becomes ERC20 tokenized commodity vault (minted xTokens).
  • Investors receive asymmetric exposure to real farmland commodities through the xToken and its daily yield.

How LandX Works

  • LandX provides capital to real-world farmers in exchange for a legal share of their crop in perpetuity.
  • LandX provides capital to real-world farmers in exchange for a legal share of their crop in perpetuity.
  • The contract is ensured by a farm audit, security deposit, and lien on their land.
  • The farmer's crop share becomes ERC20 tokenized commodity vault (minted xTokens).
  • Investors receive asymmetric exposure to real farmland commodities through the xToken and its daily yield.

The LandX Token (LNDX)

Governance token of the LandX DAO.

Members of the DAO:

  • Earn a percentage of trading fees.
  • Vote on governance decisions for the LandX platform and future updates.
  • Can become farmland validators.

LandX Partners

LNDX In The Press

LandX Community

menua:

The ability to diversify my investments in cryptoassets into land which is inflation hedged and secured by farmers/validators. In my opinion, this is the future of land ownership.

1hary1:

Innovative approach in connecting real world farmers and their crops with web3 investors/users and thus providing a great way for farmers to access a different source of financing and at the same time a great way to secure yield for investors.

@xenophobe(#6177):

Innovative product that does not rely on ponzinomics to derive sustainable yield. Stands a good chance of getting product market fit.

Devs#8348:

The idea of investing in farms through crypto... LandX is a sort of a hybrid model where you invest in digital assets that are backed by physical things (i.e. crops).

zen#9270:

The project LandX has a great idea. The project combines blockchain and the real world. Agriculture will always be relevant and will only grow as world hunger is now predicted.

TreatedMeranti#9484:

That something like farmland was being tokenised, a difference to the generic projects launching, its really the first I've heard of doing it and the team has all the right answers to questions so far.

prasimix#4836:

Great on-chain real world use case for blockchain technology

mjstheller#7367:

The fact that LandX introduces farmland commodities on chain is what caught my attention. I see it as a hedge against inflation.

mjstheller#7367:

FARMLAND. Feeding billions of families around the globe, farmland yield is trustworthy, sustainable, and consistent.

Shola#0946:

It is really interesting, I haven't seen any agricultural perpetual contract that connects real life agriculture to blockchain.

div#2483:

Very Excited About How the Perpetual Commodity Vaults Links Farmland Yields to Blockchain. I am very interested in how investors can hedge against inflation and gain direct access to agricultural commodities including wheat, corn, soybeans and rice.

#8666203f:

Fascinating experiment and perfect ReFi usecase, particularly in this macroeconomic environment. I was led to LandX via KlimaDao, and get most excited about the capability of the partnership.

Cryptotolgy:

I love the transparency about landx.fi the team treats the community with care and I love what the team are building so far 🥰.

menua:

The ability to diversify my investments in cryptoassets into land which is inflation hedged and secured by farmers/validators. In my opinion, this is the future of land ownership.

1hary1:

Innovative approach in connecting real world farmers and their crops with web3 investors/users and thus providing a great way for farmers to access a different source of financing and at the same time a great way to secure yield for investors.
